titleStmt.title: SII 34.182: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 182. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the first prākāra of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 43rd year = A.D. 1133.
Registers a gift of money for sandhi lamps in the temple of Tiruvāḷpōkki-malai in Kuṟunāga-nāḍu by a merchant of Śivapādśēkhara-puram in the same nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī vīramE tuṇaiyākavun tiyākamE yaṇiyākavuñ ceṅkOloccik karuṅkali kaṭin
tu pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇi
muṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara riciyaluṟṟiḻa tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkaranaṭātti
vijaiyapiṣEkam paṇṇi vīrasiṁhāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya
rājakēcari paṟmarāna tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅka cōḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 3 Āvatu rāja mahē
ntira vaḷanāṭṭu kuṟunāka nāṭṭu tiruvāḷp pōkkimalai mahādevaṟkku cantiviḷakkerikkaikku Iṉnāṭṭu civapā
ta cēkarapurattu viyāpāri kaṭampūruṭaiyāṉ tiruttayaṉ periyānēṉ nāyanār tirumāḷikai devaṟkku tiru puṟakkuṭai
yilē canti Oṉṟukku tiruviḷakku Oṉṟāka cantimūṉṟukku tiruviḷakku jōti viḷakkāka Erikkak kaṭavōmāka piḷḷai ca
ṇḍeśvavara devar śrīhastattilE nīrvārttu IttEvar śivaprāhmaṇarOm koṇṭakācu 3 Ikkācu mūṉṟu
m koṇṭu Ikkācu mūṉṟukkum Araikkāl Akkappalicai poli Ippalicaikku
ccilavāka Idevar śivabrāhmaṇarōm kaviśiyaṉ Aiñnūṟṟuvaṉ periyāṉ Enaa takkaṭavāṉum kaviciyaṉ
mātēvaṉ Uyyakkoṇṭānāna tekṣiṇāmūrtti paṇḍitaṉum kāśyapan cāttan nākaṉāna tiricciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉu kā
śyapaṉ māṇikka tEvan tiruttavattuṟaiyaṉ māṇikka nāyaka paṇṭitaṉum kāśyapaṉ māṇikkatEvaṉ parañcOtiyā
n tillai nāyakapaṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivōm tirutta ya ṉum kāśyapan cāttan nāyakaṉāṉa tiricciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉum kā
canti Oṉṟukku tiruviḷakku Oṉṟāka canti mūnṟukkum cantirātityavaṟ ṉāṅkaḷ tiruviḷakkerikkak kaṭavōmāka Idevar ti
ruvācal paṭi kaṭantu viḷa kku pūjittu paṇiceytārai canti mūnṟukkum tiruviḷakku Erikka kaṭavōmānōm A
ññūṟṟuvaṉ periyāṉum mātēvaṉ Uyyak koṇṭāṉum cāttaṉ nākaṉum māṇikkatēvaṉ tiruttavattu
ṟaiyaṉum māṇikkatēvaṉ māṇikkaccōtiyum Ippaṭi sammatittu Ippiramāṇam ceytu kuṭuttōm Iv
vaṉaivōm Ittiruviḷakku Erikkaikku Ippiramaāṇappaṭi cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvā
nāka sammatittu Ippiramāṇañ ceytu kuṭuttōm tirutteyan periyāṉukku Iva
ḷ paṇikka Ipramāṇam Eḻutinēṉ Ittēvar kōyil kaṇakkaṉ marutūruṭaiyān poṟcuśivaṉē
Eḻuttu Idharmma tiruviḷakku tūṇṭi var pādam Eṉ talaimēlatu Idharmma paṉmāhēśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
